hero.title: GenomIQ
hero.subtitle: Modern bioinformatics platform with AI assistance
hero.description: Discover the power of artificial intelligence applied to genomics with our intuitive platform designed for researchers and scientists.
hero.tryAiTitle: Would you like to try our AI?
hero.featureDescription: Our platform integrates cutting-edge technologies to provide accurate and fast genome analysis with real-time visualization.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Discover the tools that will transform your bioinformatics research
features.moreInfo: Want to learn more about our advanced bioinformatics solutions?

feature1.title: AI conversation interface
feature1.description: Will help you understand results and how our platform works!

feature2.title: Scientific visualizations
feature2.description: High-quality visualizations of biological sequences and structures

feature3.title: Integrated analysis tools
feature3.description: Access powerful bioinformatics tools through a unified interface

cta.title: Ready to revolutionize your genomic research?
cta.description: Join thousands of researchers and scientists around the world who are already using GenomIQ to accelerate their discoveries.

dashboard.quickStartDescription: Get started with your first sequence analysis
dashboard.toolsDescription: Explore our suite of bioinformatics tools

chat.title: AI Chat
chat.noMessages: Send a message to start a conversation
chat.disclaimer: GenomIQ AI can make mistakes. Consider checking important information.
chat.suggestedQuestion3: What are the applications of genomics in medicine?
chat.welcomeMessage: How can I help you today?

tools.title: Bioinformatics Tools
tools.blastDesc: Search sequence databases for similarity to query sequences using various BLAST algorithms
tools.alignmentDesc: Align multiple sequences and generate phylogenetic trees using Clustal Omega & MUSCLE
tools.translationDesc: Translate DNA/RNA sequences to protein with multiple reading frame options
tools.visualizationDesc: Interactive 3D visualization of protein and DNA structures from PDB files
tools.annotationDesc: Retrieve and visualize annotations from UniProt, Pfam and other databases

translation.sequenceInputLabel: Enter your DNA or RNA sequence
translation.sequenceInputHelp: Spaces and line breaks will be automatically removed.
translation.errorInvalidDNA: Sequence contains invalid characters for DNA (only A, T, G, C allowed)
translation.errorInvalidRNA: Sequence contains invalid characters for RNA (only A, U, G, C allowed)
translation.searchPlaceholder: Search for a sequence by name or identifier

visualization.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop your PDB file here or click to browse
visualization.noResults: Upload a PDB file to visualize the 3D structure
visualization.errorNoFile: Please upload a PDB file first
visualization.errorInvalidFile: Invalid file. Only PDB files (.pdb) are supported
visualization.structureSearchPlaceholder: Enter protein name, gene, or PDB ID (e.g., insulin, 4ins)
visualization.searchHelp: Enter a protein name, gene name, UniProt ID, or PDB ID (e.g., 4INS).
visualization.errorInvalidPDB: Invalid PDB file format. File must contain ATOM records.
visualization.aiResponseError: Could not understand AI response. Please try a more specific query.
visualization.noPDBFound: No structures found for this query. Try a different protein name or PDB ID.
visualization.pdbDownloadError: Could not download the PDB file. Please try again later.
visualization.invalidStructureData: The AI did not return valid structure data.

blast.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated analysis may contain errors. Please verify important findings.
blast.errorSequenceTooShort: Sequence must be at least 10 characters long
blast.pageDescription: Basic Local Alignment Search Tool (BLAST) finds regions of similarity between biological sequences.
blast.evalueDescription: Expected number of chance matches. Lower values indicate more significant matches.
blast.remoteApiDescription: Uses the NCBI BLAST API instead of local computation.
blast.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this job?
blast.noHitsFound: No hits found for this query
blast.alignmentNeedsImplementation: Detailed alignments view is not fully implemented in this version.
blast.errorInvalidFile: Invalid file format. Please upload a text or FASTA file
blast.noAlignmentsFound: No alignments found in the results
blast.noAlignmentsForHit: No alignments found for this hit
blast.waitingForOtherSearch: Please wait for the current search to complete
blast.searchNucleotidePlaceholder: Search for a nucleotide sequence (e.g., "human TP53 gene")
blast.searchProteinPlaceholder: Search for a protein sequence (e.g., "insulin human")
blast.errorNotProteinSequence: The searched sequence does not appear to be a protein sequence
blast.errorNotNucleotideSequence: The searched sequence does not appear to be a nucleotide sequence
blast.noResultsFound: No sequence was found for your search

alignment.title: Multiple Sequence Alignment
alignment.description: Align multiple DNA, RNA, or protein sequences to identify conserved regions and generate phylogenetic trees
alignment.consensusDesc: The consensus sequence represents the most common residue at each position in the alignment.
alignment.nextStep1: Analyze conserved regions to identify functional domains
alignment.nextStep2: Export your alignment for use in other tools
alignment.nextStep3: Visualize the structure of your aligned proteins using our 3D Visualization tool
alignment.errorNotEnoughSequences: Please provide at least two sequences for alignment
alignment.errorEmptySequence: One or more sequences are empty
alignment.aiSearchPlaceholder: Type organism or protein name (e.g. 'dolphin hemoglobin')
alignment.waitingForSequences: Waiting for sequences to be ready...
alignment.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated analysis may contain errors. Please verify important findings.
alignment.patience: Please be patient while we analyze your data

annotation.serviceOverloaded: Service is temporarily overloaded. Please try again in a few minutes.
annotation.serviceUnavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
annotation.networkError: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
annotation.searchTimeout: Search timed out. Please try a simpler query.
annotation.sequenceNotFound: Sequence not found in the database.
annotation.requestTimeout: Request timed out. The server may be experiencing high load.
annotation.searchingPleaseWait: This may take a few seconds
annotation.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or check the spelling
annotation.rateLimitError: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before searching again.
annotation.serverError: Server temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
annotation.title: Sequence Annotation
annotation.description: Retrieve and visualize annotations from UniProt, Pfam and other databases
annotation.sequenceIdHelp: Enter a UniProt, GenBank, Pfam or Prosite ID
annotation.proteinSequencePlaceholder: Enter amino acid sequence (FASTA format accepted)
annotation.uniprotDesc: Comprehensive protein database with functional annotations
annotation.prositeDesc: Protein domains, families and functional sites
annotation.nextStep1: Explore the detected features by hovering over them in the visualization
annotation.nextStep2: Export your results to CSV for further analysis
annotation.nextStep3: Try different databases to get complementary annotations
annotation.interactionHelp: Hover over features to see details. Click the zoom button to expand view.
annotation.noSearchResults: No features match your search criteria
annotation.errorEmptyInput: Please enter a sequence or an accession ID
annotation.errorGeneric: Error fetching annotations. Please try again.
annotation.noResultsDesc: Submit a sequence or accession ID to retrieve annotations
annotation.noFeaturesDesc: No annotation features were found for this sequence. Try a different database or sequence type.
annotation.noFeaturesFound: No features found matching your criteria
annotation.waitingForOtherSearch: Please wait for the current search to complete
annotation.searchIdPlaceholder: Search for a sequence ID (e.g., 'human insulin')
annotation.searchSequencePlaceholder: Identify this sequence or find similar ones
annotation.seqvizHelp: Navigate the visualization with mouse controls
